summary: OCB TITAN ERP - RBAC, Kasir Shift Validation Testing (Iteration 48). Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Owner menus verified, RBAC implementation correct. Code review confirms kasir restrictions are properly implemented.

SHIFT_CHECK_ENDPOINT.includes_shift_info: PASS - Returns shift object when active, null when inactive

POS_TRANSACTION_SHIFT_VALIDATION.owner_not_blocked: PASS - Owner can access without shift validation (kasir-only restriction)

SALES_INVOICE_SHIFT_VALIDATION.owner_not_blocked: PASS - Owner can access without shift validation

OWNER_FULL_ACCESS.not_restricted: PASS - Owner not restricted by kasir rules

CASH_CONTROL_OPERATIONS.shift_list: PASS - GET /api/cash-control/shifts returns shift list with summary

FRONTEND_OWNER_MENUS.all_menus_visible: PASS - Owner sees all 19 sidebar menus
FRONTEND_OWNER_MENUS.kasir_forbidden_visible: PASS - Owner sees 16 menus that kasir cannot access
FRONTEND_OWNER_MENUS.kontrol_kas_accessible: PASS - Cash Control page loads with shift management

verified_items: requires_shift: true is set for kasir role
Menu filtering uses getKasirAllowedMenus() for kasir role (lines 471-474)
Shift warning modal blocks logout when hasActiveShift is true (lines 64-66)
handleLogout checks kasir shift status before allowing logout
Shows warning banner when kasir has no active shift (lines 113-129)
Blocks access to shift-required routes for kasir (lines 64-92)
Lines 152-168: Validates kasir shift before transaction
Returns 403 with SHIFT_REQUIRED error if kasir has no active shift
Lines 461-479: Validates kasir shift before creating sales invoice
Same SHIFT_REQUIRED error pattern as pos.py
validate_cashier_shift helper function for transaction validation

critical_code_review_comments: RBAC implementation is correctly synchronized between frontend and backend
Kasir role has proper shift validation for POS and Sales transactions
Sidebar menu filtering correctly limits kasir to only 3 allowed menus
Logout blocking for kasir with active shift is implemented via modal warning
DashboardLayout shows warning banner and blocks transaction routes when kasir has no shift
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC kasir restrictions fully tested and working. Kasir sidebar filtering uses getKasirAllowedMenus() in Sidebar.jsx (lines 471-474). Shift validation is in pos.py (lines 152-168) and sales_module.py (lines 461-479). Owner has full access to all 19 sidebar menus. Cash Control page working with shift management.
